Categories
Getting started
New to Otter? Here are the basics to get started with Otter.
Using Otter
From recording to creating groups, learn how Otter works from top to bottom.
Meeting settings & recordings
Learn about managing your settings and features for your online meetings.
Otter Enterprise
Learn how to use and manage Otter Enterprise features.
Otter Workspaces
Learn how to manage your team in Otter. 
Integrations
Connect, simplify, and automate. Discover the power of apps.
Account settings & billing
Adjust your settings and manage your billing in Otter.
Announcements
✨
    Tips & shortcuts
  
Otter Chat & Quick Search
        Press 
⌘/Ctrl + K
 to open the search bar to ask Otter Chat or search for conversations.
      
Manage Otter Notetaker Settings
All Notetaker settings (e.g., 
auto-share
, 
auto-join
) can be managed in 
Account Settings > Meetings
.
      
Record without headphones
Download our 
Desktop app
 to record meetings without headphones.

llm_raw.description: An AI-powered meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes voice conversations in real-time.
llm_raw.notes: Otter provides a REST API primarily for Enterprise customers and specific integrations; public developer documentation is limited compared to general SaaS platforms.
